title: CSM Case State
description: Structured telemetry output representing the current state of a ServiceNow CSM case. Produced by the csm_pulse_strategist skill and validated before writing to telemetry/csm_case_state.md.

project_key.description: Unique project identifier. Must match the key in state.json.

source_platform.description: The platform this case was extracted from. Fixed to 'servicenow' for this schema version.

extracted_at.description: ISO 8601 UTC timestamp of when this case state was extracted from ServiceNow.

account_name.description: Name of the customer account associated with this case.

case_state.description: Current lifecycle state of the case in ServiceNow.

priority.description: Case priority as set in ServiceNow. P1 = Critical, P2 = High, P3 = Moderate, P4 = Low.

sla_status.description: Current SLA compliance status at the time of extraction.

assigned_to.description: The agent or team currently assigned to this case in ServiceNow.

open_duration_hours.description: Total hours the case has been open, measured from creation time to extracted_at.

notes.description: Optional. Free-form notes about this case state — escalation context, blockers, or reviewer observations.
